business_ideas.idea: WPBeginner - WordPress tutorial site with 2M+ monthly visitors, affiliate revenue
OptinMonster - email opt-in software SaaS launched 2013
Gas station portfolio investing - buying cash-flowing assets to support family
Bank building acquisition - buying commercial real estate (Wells Fargo branch)
Niche software tools acquisition - buying small $10K+/month revenue apps on secondary market
High-intent affiliate marketing - verticals paying $100+ per lead (not commission)

predictions.text: Content businesses hit traffic ceiling and don't compound; SaaS recurring revenue scales faster
Wealth building via appreciating assets (real estate, businesses) beats spending salary
Make money on acquisition not exit - know cost reductions and revenue synergies before buying
